description: Known-answer calibration set for testing whether DeepSeek can distinguish narrow planning-quality levels.

cases.text: Chapter excerpt: Mara watches Ashren's guards search the market. Sena argues with a clerk nearby. Mara notes the true-ink smell and waits until the commotion passes. Endpoint: the guards leave and Mara continues walking.

Chapter excerpt: Mara decides she should probably investigate the erased road someday. Ilyan says the Survey may not like questions. Mara thinks about the risk but keeps the map folded and goes home. Endpoint: Mara resolves to be more careful.

Chapter excerpt: Ilyan offers Mara a legal pardon if she gives him Sena's smuggled map before Ashren arrives. Mara wants the pardon but knows the map is the only proof of the erased province. She refuses, tears up the pardon writ, and flees with Sena. Endpoint: Ashren names Mara an outlaw.

Chapter excerpt: Mara reaches the Crown hearing with proof that would restore her charter, but exposing it will also reveal Sena's illegal route network and endanger every village hiding from Ashren. Mara chooses the villages over her career, burns the restoration writ in public, and publishes the forbidden road. Endpoint: Mara becomes the outlaw cartographer she feared, but the erased province can now be found.

Chapter excerpt: Ashren's soldiers burst into the room, seize Mara's map, and drag Sena away. Mara shouts for them to stop, but the scene turns because Ashren gives the order and the soldiers obey. Endpoint: Mara is left alone with no map and no decision made.

Chapter excerpt: Mara decides to climb across three rooftops to reach the archive faster. No one opposes her, and if she fails she can simply take the stairs. She reaches the archive, pleased with herself. Endpoint: Mara starts searching shelves.

Chapter excerpt: Mara can escape through the alley before the patrol arrives, but Sena is pinned under a fallen cart with the only route ledger. Mara turns back, loses her head start, and frees Sena. Endpoint: the patrol sees Mara's face and begins the chase.

Chapter excerpt: The city has towers, old maps, and many customs. Mara walks through the archive and sees unusual lamps. The setting feels ancient while she searches for a clue. Endpoint: Mara finds a note.

Chapter excerpt: True-ink is said to burn when maps lie, and Mara remembers this as she studies a legal map. The rule is mentioned in her thoughts, but the ink does not affect the scene. Endpoint: Mara decides the map looks suspicious.

Chapter excerpt: Mara tries to draw a safe route around Ashren's checkpoint, but true-ink burns through every false road she adds. The burning forces her to include the hidden village, making the map illegal evidence. Endpoint: Mara hides the smoking page before the clerk sees it.

Chapter excerpt: Mara lies to the living road by naming a harmless destination, and the road twists back toward Ashren's patrol. To save Sena, Mara must speak the erased province's true name aloud, which opens the forbidden route and alerts every Survey bell in the valley. Endpoint: the world rule forces Mara's public commitment and starts the pursuit.

Chapter excerpt: The archive is built under seven oath-wheels, each painted with a different ancient map taboo. Mara admires the machinery and remembers guild legends about oath-cartographers. The wheels never move, and no rule changes her options. Endpoint: Mara chooses a drawer to inspect.

Chapter excerpt: When Mara copies Ashren's official border, true-ink burns only along one missing valley. The burn reveals where the false map was altered, forcing Mara to hide the page from the clerk. Endpoint: Mara has illegal evidence but has not yet acted on it publicly.

Chapter excerpt: The living road will open only if Mara names the person she most wants to protect. Naming Sena will save the village but expose Sena to Ashren's oath-trackers. Mara speaks Sena's name, the road opens, and every tracker turns toward them. Endpoint: the world rule forces a sacrifice and launches the pursuit.
Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: Mara eats dinner, notices the rain, and remembers her mother's advice. Consequence: the chapter closes quietly with no new action.
Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: Mara says she may need to take the forbidden road later. Consequence: Sena nods, and they agree to rest before deciding what to do.

Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: Mara rejects Ilyan's pardon, marks the forbidden road in true-ink, and gives the map to Sena. Consequence: Ashren can now charge Mara with illegal cartography.

Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: Mara rejects Ilyan's pardon, speaks the erased province's true name, and steps onto the living road as Survey bells start ringing. Consequence: Ashren's riders can follow the bells, Sena is exposed as Mara's accomplice, and the next chapter must become a pursuit.

Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: a warehouse explodes across town, killing an unnamed clerk and scattering ash over the harbor. Consequence: everyone runs toward the smoke, but Mara has not chosen the road or changed her commitment.

Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: Mara tells Sena, 'I suppose the forbidden road may be our only option.' Consequence: they agree to sleep before making a real decision.

Declared endpoint: Mara commits to the forbidden road. Final scene: Mara signs the forbidden road into her map and seals it with true-ink. Consequence: she can no longer submit a legal map to regain her charter, but no immediate pursuer or next-scene crisis appears.

Chapter excerpt: Mara visits the river gate, the bell tower, and the old archive. Each place has a different smell and history. She remembers three childhood lessons about maps. Endpoint: the chapter ends after the descriptions.

Chapter excerpt: Mara buys ink, checks the archive door, speaks briefly with Sena, and walks home before curfew. The events happen in order, but none clearly causes the next or makes the situation harder. Endpoint: Mara plans to return tomorrow.

Chapter excerpt: Mara copies Ashren's border in true-ink. Because the ink burns through the missing valley, the clerk notices smoke and demands to see her page. Mara hides it in her sleeve, which makes the clerk suspicious. Endpoint: the clerk calls for a guard.

Chapter excerpt: Mara burns the pardon to protect Sena. That alerts Ashren's oath clerk, who seals every legal gate. Forced away from the main road, Mara names the forbidden route, which opens but rings the Survey bells. Endpoint: the bells force the next chapter into pursuit.

Chapter excerpt: Mara sprints over rooftops, ducks through a laundry yard, argues with a baker, steals a lantern, and reaches the archive. The action is energetic, but the obstacles do not arise from prior choices and nothing materially escalates. Endpoint: she opens the archive door.

Chapter excerpt: Mara compares two maps and discovers Ashren erased a village. Because she tells Sena, Sena reveals that his family still lives there. The discovery changes the plan from proving fraud to reaching the village first. Endpoint: Mara and Sena leave the archive with a new destination.

Chapter excerpt: Mara tries to smuggle the route ledger through the legal gate, but true-ink exposes the false cover. The guard seizes the ledger, so Mara must publicly accuse Ashren before the evidence disappears. Endpoint: her failed stealth plan forces an open accusation and immediate retaliation.

Chapter excerpt: The Cartographers' Guild was founded two centuries ago after the river changed course. Its members follow seven taboos and maintain careful records. Mara's family once belonged to the guild. Endpoint: the history explains why maps matter.

Chapter excerpt: Mara wants to find the missing valley entry before dawn. She enters the archive, chooses the correct shelf, and copies the ledger without anyone interfering. Endpoint: she leaves with the note.

Chapter excerpt: Mara wants Ilyan to let her inspect the sealed ledger. Ilyan refuses unless she gives him Sena's map. Mara lies that the map is already with Ashren, forcing Ilyan to unlock the ledger before Ashren can claim credit. Outcome: Mara gets one page but Ilyan realizes she is protecting Sena.

Chapter excerpt: Mara wants Ashren to admit the erased province exists before the Crown witness leaves. Ashren threatens to expose Sena unless Mara recants. Mara instead marks the forbidden road in true-ink in front of the witness. Outcome: she saves the province's proof but loses her legal charter, and Ashren orders her arrest.

Chapter excerpt: Rain falls over the archive roof. Lamps glow against wet stone. Mara thinks about how lonely the city has become and how much she misses honest maps. Endpoint: the mood darkens before the next chapter.

Chapter excerpt: Mara asks Sena for the forbidden road's name. Sena hesitates and says the name may kill them both. The scene breaks away before Mara answers, learns anything, or changes course. Endpoint: the question remains open.

Chapter excerpt: Mara wants to leave the archive unnoticed. The clerk blocks the exit and asks why her sleeve is smoking. Mara spills clean ink over the clerk's register, creating a harmless crisis, and escapes while the clerk saves the book. Outcome: she gets away, but the clerk remembers her face.

Standing promise: who erased the province and why? Chapter excerpt: Mara repairs a bridge rope, helps a child across, and watches river birds circle above the city. No clue, setup, or related question advances. Endpoint: she continues toward the archive.

Standing promise: who erased the province and why? Chapter excerpt: Sena says the erased province is dangerous and important. Mara agrees they must learn the truth someday. No new clue or partial answer appears. Endpoint: they decide to keep investigating.

Standing promise: who erased the province and why? Chapter excerpt: Mara finds true-ink burns only where Ashren's official border crosses the missing valley. The clue does not reveal the motive, but it proves the erasure was deliberate. Endpoint: Mara now knows which map was altered.

Standing promise: who erased the province and why? Chapter excerpt: Mara opens the sealed ledger and learns the province erased itself by oath to hide refugees from the Crown, while Ashren has been keeping the oath alive through false maps. Endpoint: Mara's goal changes from exposing Ashren to deciding whether the truth would destroy the refuge.

Standing promise: who erased the province and why? Chapter excerpt: Ashren dramatically warns that the answer will ruin Mara. The warning repeats the importance of the mystery but provides no new fact, clue, payoff, or changed obligation. Endpoint: Mara remains curious.

Standing promise: why does true-ink burn over the old border? Chapter excerpt: Sena reveals true-ink burns when a map violates an oath, not when a map is merely false. This explains the earlier burns but does not reveal whose oath controls the border. Endpoint: Mara changes which records she searches next.

Standing promise: what did Mara's mother hide in the route ledger? Chapter excerpt: Mara reads her mother's note: the ledger names every family sheltered in the erased province, including Sena's. The discovery pays off the hidden-ledger promise and forces Mara to protect the ledger instead of publishing it. Endpoint: the central investigation becomes a protection mission.

Scene excerpt: Mara goes to the archive because the plot needs the next clue. She opens the drawer, copies the ledger, and leaves. No desire, fear, flaw, value, or relationship pressure explains why this action matters to her.

Scene excerpt: Mara searches the archive because she wants to do the right thing. The goal is morally positive but generic; it is not tied to her fear of betraying hidden villages, her need to regain her charter, her distrust of Sena, or her flaw of trusting maps over people.

Scene excerpt: Mara refuses Ilyan's shortcut because accepting his help would prove she still needs the Crown Survey she claims to reject. Her fear of dependence shapes the tactic: she chooses the illegal basement route instead. Outcome: she reaches the ledger but leaves evidence of trespass.

Scene excerpt: Sena begs Mara to burn the route ledger because it names refugee villages. Mara wants her charter restored and needs the ledger as proof, but her mother's old lesson makes her fear becoming another official who sacrifices people to maps. She burns the page that would clear her name and keeps only the village route. Outcome: she loses her legal defense and commits to protecting Sena's people.

Scene excerpt: Mara hurries because guards will arrive in ten minutes. The deadline creates pressure, but the plan does not connect her action to a personal desire, fear, flaw, value, or relationship. Outcome: she escapes before the bells ring.

Scene excerpt: Mara lies to the clerk because Sena is watching and she cannot bear to let him see her return to obedient Survey habits. Her pride and fragile trust with Sena shape the choice. Outcome: the clerk becomes suspicious, but Sena follows her instead of abandoning the plan.

Scene excerpt: Mara can ask Sena what he knows or secretly verify his story with true-ink. Her flaw pushes her to trust measurement over him, while her need for an ally pushes the other way. She tests the map behind his back. Outcome: the ink proves him right, but Sena catches her and their alliance becomes conditional.
Scene excerpt: Mara studies a map alone, copies a border, and hides the page. No meaningful interaction with another character occurs, and no relationship state is established or changed.

Scene excerpt: Mara and Sena trade jokes while crossing the market. They already trust each other, and the exchange does not alter trust, debt, leverage, suspicion, loyalty, rivalry, intimacy, or power. Outcome: they continue toward the archive.

Scene excerpt: Mara expects Sena to sell her out when Ilyan offers a reward, but Sena lies that the ledger is a fake and draws the guard away. Mara realizes he chose her over quick money. Outcome: she gives him the real route name and their trust improves.

Scene excerpt: Mara publicly names Sena as her source to stop Ashren from executing him as an anonymous smuggler. The act saves Sena but exposes him as her accomplice. Outcome: Sena now owes her his life, Ashren can hunt them both, and their alliance becomes an unavoidable shared fate.

Scene excerpt: Ilyan stands beside Mara while she reads the map. He warns her that the road is dangerous. She ignores him because she already mistrusts him, and nothing in the exchange changes that mistrust or affects the outcome.

Scene excerpt: Ilyan catches Mara with the forbidden ink and could report her immediately. Instead he demands a copy of the map. Outcome: their relationship shifts from former colleagues to mutual blackmail, and Mara must bargain with him to leave.

Scene excerpt: Mara trusts Ilyan with the safe route, but he gives it to Ashren to regain his Survey post. Outcome: Mara loses the route, Ilyan becomes an active betrayer, and the next chapter must deal with Ashren reaching the hidden village first.

Scene excerpt: Mara walks through the archive and notices the quiet shelves. She finds a drawer and reads a page. The scene does not establish what can be lost, won, exposed, protected, changed, or endangered.

Scene excerpt: Mara says the map is important and dangerous. She copies it without interference, hides it safely, and leaves in the same position she entered. The stakes are stated but the value state does not visibly change.

Scene excerpt: Mara enters the archive anonymously and safe. When true-ink burns through the false border, smoke marks her sleeve and the clerk sees it. Outcome: she leaves with evidence but is now identifiable as the illegal cartographer.

Scene excerpt: Mara can still surrender the map and remain legal. Instead she signs the forbidden road in true-ink before the Crown witness. Outcome: she moves from licensed cartographer to public criminal, Ashren orders her arrest, and the next conflict must be escape.

Scene excerpt: Mara runs across rooftops while guards shout below. The chase is exciting, but she starts wanted and ends wanted with no clearer cost, exposure, relationship change, or new danger. Outcome: she reaches the next street.

Scene excerpt: Mara begins believing Sena is a useful ally. She finds his mark on the forged border and realizes he knew more than he admitted. Outcome: the value state shifts from trust to suspicion, and she withholds the route name.

Scene excerpt: Mara starts with a hopeful legal plan: present the ledger and regain her charter. Ilyan burns the ledger in front of the witness. Outcome: legal rescue becomes impossible, her only proof is gone, and she must choose between fleeing or making a public accusation without evidence.
